svg.title: half_arc_terminal_mars_reference
svg.desc: half_arc_terminal_mars_reference comparison reference at 800 meter radius with low, mid, and high time-to-go bands.
svg.text: Comparison reference · tuned for steadier practical flight time · gravity = 3.71m/s² (mars)
Bands are solved from time-to-go. Low may start upward at shallow cells when the tuned practical flight time calls for it.
